stemHtml: What is correct for PDE (Path Definition Error)?

options.a: Path defined by RNAV system does not correspond to the desired path.
options.b: Path defined by RNAV system corresponds to the desired path.
options.c: The RNAV calculated aircraft coordinates corresponds to the actual aircraft coordinates.
options.d: It relates to the air crew or autopilot’s ability to follow the defined path or track.
